residual_risks: This is a plan review only; final GO for implementation still requires PR6 RED fixtures, validator wiring, command evidence, and final implementation reviewer evidence.
The plan deliberately keeps stale snapshot age advisory/non-blocking; any live Confluence refresh or publish remains a separate human-approved workflow.
CI runtime-change detection currently enumerates script names in .github/workflows/quality-gate.yml:26, so implementation must add any new PR6 top-level script names there as planned.
